summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 25 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are retained for maintainer/author follow-up; already-closed PRs are skipped; unhydrated candidates are isolated as needs_human for hydration before any decision.
